security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Manage your email and password to secure your account
security.email_description: Updating your email address will change how you log in.
security.password_description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Manage your notification settings and display preferences
preferences.push_notifications_desc: Enable push notifications to receive real-time updates on your device.
preferences.notification_types_desc: Choose which events you want to be notified about.
preferences.display_settings_desc: Customize the look and feel of your application.

billings.title: Billing & Subscriptions
billings.subtitle: Manage your payment methods and invoices

errors.username_min: Username must be at least 4 characters long
errors.username_max: Username must be at most 20 characters long
errors.password_min: Password must be at least 12 characters long
errors.password_max: Password must be at most 60 characters long
errors.password_complexity: Password must contain at least one number, one uppercase letter, and one special character
errors.phone_numbers_only: Phone number must contain only numbers
errors.phone_min: Phone must be at least 10 characters long
errors.phone_max: Phone must be at most 15 characters long
